title: The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|imp|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:NEGWTcover.jpg]] |title=''The New Essential Guide to
Weapons and Technology'' |author=[[W. Haden Blackman]] |cover artist= |illustrator=*[[Ian Fullwood]] *[[Paul Bates]] *[[Stuart Wagland]] *[[Rob Garrard]] *[[Nick Foreman]] *[[Phil Lunt]] *[[Tim Ball]] *[[Sylvain Michaelis]] |editor=*[[Allan Kausch]] ([[Lucasfilm]]) *[[Steve Saffel]] ([[Del Rey]]) |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |release date=*[[October 26]], [[2004]] {{C|Paperback}}{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/14273/the-new-essential-guide-to-weapons-and-technology-revised-edition-star-wars-by-w-haden-blackman|text=The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology: Revised Edition: Star Wars}} *[[September 22]], [[2014]] {{C|Hardcover}}{{BN|url=w/star-wars-w-haden-blackman/1118957888|text=Star Wars: The New Essential Guide to Weapons & Technology}} {{C|Hardcover}} |type=*Hardcover *Paperback |pages= |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=9780345449030 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} The tenth book in [[Del Rey]]'s ''Essential Guide'' series, '''''The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology''''' is the updated version of ''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''. This book featured new full color and three-dimensional illustrations of over two hundred different devices, ranging from [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]] to [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot's]] cyborg implant and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] devices. The book added many devices from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']], [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], and [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series of books. It was reprinted as part of ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters, Weapons and Technology, and Vehicles and Vessels]]'' in [[2005]]. ==Contents== ===Introduction=== *Timeline *Vital Statistics *Historical Perspective ===A Guide to Major Manufacturers===

rifle ID chart *Additional grenades and explosives *Lightsabers *Stormtrooper and clone trooper armor ==Continuity== *The [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] writing on the page about [[Darth Vader's armor/Legends|Darth Vader's armor]] translates as "Sith Trooper Armor". Similarly on the page about [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|Vonduun crab armor]], the Aurebesh at the bottom of the page translates to "A Vonduun Crab Shell-Plated Armor Sith Speeder". *The [[Sun Crusher]] affiliation is said to be [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]. This is an error, as the Empire never used it in battle. *The Aurebesh writing on the page about fusion cutters misspells the word as 'fuscioncutter'. *"Missile" is misspelled as "Missle" on pages 26 and 173. *[[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber]] is said to resemble [[Darth Vader's lightsaber/Legends|Darth Vader's lightsaber]] when it was really modeled after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi's third lightsaber/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's third lightsaber]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology}}
